name: Stuffed Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplants in half lengthwise and scoop out the pulp, leaving a 3/8-inch shell. Set aside.
2. Assemble the food grinder with the coarse grinding plate. Turn to speed 4 and grind the eggplant pulp, onions, and garlic.
3. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat. Add the ground vegetables and sauté for 4 minutes.
4. Add rice, chicken broth, sugar, basil, salt, pepper, and cinnamon; mix well. Cover and simmer over low heat for 15 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes and continue to simmer for another 10 minutes.
6. Remove the mixture from heat and stir in Parmesan cheese. Loosely stuff each eggplant shell with the filling.
7. Place the stuffed shells in a greased 9x13x2-inch pan. Brush with butter.
8. Cover and bake at 325°F for 20 minutes. Remove the cover and continue baking for another 30 minutes or until the tops are crusty. Serve immediately.
